data.title: Binance Wallet Launches BNB Smart Chain Trading Competition on Binance Alpha
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Wallet launches BNB Smart Chain Trading Competition on Binance Alpha. During the event, you can share $3.3 million worth of rewards by trading LA, RDO, RWA, BDXN, ELDE and TGT in Binance Wallet (without private key) or through Binance Alpha. Event time: 00:00 on June 7, 2025 to 00:00 on June 21, 2025 (Eastern Time Zone 8).

data.title: a16z Crypto: Stablecoins offer an opportunity to get 1 billion people involved in cryptocurrencies
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News a16z Crypto published an article titled "Stablecoins: A 1+ billion-user onboarding opportunity", which pointed out that in the past 12 months, the transaction volume of stablecoins has reached 33 trillion US dollars, continuing to set new historical highs, close to 20 times the transaction volume of PayPal and close to 3 times the transaction volume of Visa. Stablecoins have been integrated into these huge global payment networks that have existed for decades.
The booming development of stablecoins has brought the result that $128 billion of US Treasury bonds are held by stablecoins. This makes them among the top 20 holders of US Treasury bonds, even surpassing countries such as Saudi Arabia, South Korea, the United Arab Emirates and Germany. Citibank recently predicted that by 2030, stablecoin holdings in US Treasury bonds will reach 3.7 trillion US dollars, making it the largest holder on this list. Stablecoins have long been criticized for being used only to settle speculative cryptocurrency transactions, but data shows that this is not the case.

data.title: Trump Criticizes Federal Reserve's Interest Rate Decisions
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump expressed his dissatisfaction with the Federal Reserve's interest rate policies on social media. He described the Fed's actions as a 'disaster,' highlighting that Europe has reduced interest rates ten times while the U.S. has not made any cuts. Despite this, Trump noted that the country is performing well. He urged for a one percentage point rate cut and emphasized the need to 'fill up the tank.'

data.title: Trump Considers Adjusting Debt Rates Amid Inflation Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump has suggested the possibility of reducing interest rates on upcoming debt obligations. He stated that if inflation resurfaces, increasing rates could be an effective countermeasure. Trump also mentioned that Powell's actions are causing significant losses.

data.title: Greeks.live: Investors closely watching the weakening of the ETH/BTC ratio
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live macro researcher Adam released a Chinese community briefing, which pointed out that market sentiment tends to be cautiously bearish, Bitcoin's short-term volatility has intensified, and investors are closely watching the weakening of the ETH/BTC ratio and the pressure of the $100,000 mark. Most traders believe that Ethereum is weak, but there are differences on whether it is a good time to buy the bottom. Musk's public conflict with Trump is seen as a short-term black swan event. Tesla's stock price once fell by more than 20%, triggering market fluctuations; Ethereum holdings hit a new high but the price performance was weak. Many traders believe that it is not yet time to buy the bottom. It is recommended to pay attention to the $1,500 support level instead of the $1,300 low point.

data.title: CZ mentioned Mubarak in a post
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CZ posted on X platform: "Eid Mubarak, cousins!"
Note: Today is "Eid al-Adha", also known as "Loyalty and Filial Piety Festival".

data.title: Trump: Fed should cut rates by 100 basis points
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Trump said on social media: "The Fed's "big lateness" is a disaster! Europe has cut interest rates 10 times, and we haven't cut them once. Despite his existence, our country is still doing well. Cut interest rates by one percentage point and fill up the gas!" (Jinshi)

data.title: S&P 500 Index Surpasses 6000 Points for First Time Since February
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the S&P 500 index has exceeded the 6000-point mark for the first time since February. This milestone reflects a significant recovery in the market, highlighting investor confidence and economic resilience. The index's performance is closely watched as a key indicator of the overall health of the U.S. stock market.

data.title: Trump: May lower interest rates on maturing debt
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump said that the interest rate of the upcoming maturing debt may be lowered, and if inflation reappears, the interest rate can be raised to deal with it. Powell is causing us "huge" losses. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ripple's former executive Greg Kidd's company reached a controlling acquisition agreement with Know Labs and launched a BTC financial strategy for it
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Know Labs, a listed company focusing on non-invasive health monitoring technology, announced that it has reached a controlling acquisition agreement with Goldeneye 1995 LLC, owned by financial technology investor Greg Kidd. Kidd was the chief risk officer of Ripple and will serve as the company's CEO and chairman of the board after the transaction is completed. According to the agreement, the acquirer will complete the transaction at a price of $0.335 per share through a combination of 1,000 bitcoins (calculated at the current market price) and cash, and the cash will be used to repay debts and supplement working capital. Bitcoin will be included in the company's balance sheet, accounting for 82% of the current market value, with an implied valuation of 1.22 times. Greg Kidd plans to introduce Bitcoin income strategies to the public market. The transaction has been approved unanimously by the board of directors and is expected to be completed in the third quarter of 2025. (Businesswire)

data.title: Davis Commodities Stock Surges Amid Bitcoin Reserve Plans
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Davis Commodities experienced a significant pre-market stock price increase of over 43%, raising its market capitalization to $14.7 million. This surge is potentially influenced by the company's announcement of plans to establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,500 USDT with a Narrowed 4.26% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jun 06, 2025, 13:41 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,500 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,504.860107 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 4.26% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Trump: Fed Chairman Powell should cut interest rates, "Mr. Too Late" is a disaster
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said that Federal Reserve Chairman Powell should cut interest rates. The interest rate should be adjusted down by a full percentage point. Europe has cut interest rates ten times in a row, and we have not taken any interest rate cut measures. The Fed's "Mr. Too Late" is a disaster. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bitget Onchain launches AFT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launched AFT. In addition, you can also participate in trading activities. Buying $100 of AFT will give you a chance to get $50 worth of BGB, and the total prize pool is $100,000 worth of BGB. After the event, Bitget will officially announce the lucky UID tail number, and eligible users will share the total prize pool. The event time is from 22:00:00 on June 6 to 22:00:00 on June 9 (UTC+8).

data.title: Musk's public break with Trump sparks massive sell-off in TRUMP and DOGE
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: With Musk's public breakup with US President Trump, related MEME currencies have suffered a massive sell-off. DOGE fell 6.4% to $0.1788 in 24 hours, becoming the seventh worst performing asset among the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market value; TRUMP plummeted 10% to $9.66, becoming the second largest token in the top 100 cryptocurrencies. Analysts believe that this turmoil once again confirms the double-edged sword effect of the celebrity effect in the MEME coin market. (Decrypt)

data.title: Publicly traded company Davis Commodities plans to spend $4.5 million to buy Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Davis Commodities, a listed company, plans to establish a strategic reserve of Bitcoin. It has announced that it has successfully approved a $30 million financing, of which 15% of the total financing, or $4.5 million, will be used to purchase Bitcoin. Davis Commodities is an agricultural product trading company headquartered in Singapore, mainly engaged in the trade of agricultural products such as sugar, rice and oils, and distributes these products to multiple markets including Asia, Africa and the Middle East.

data.title: Data: Uniswap v4 transaction volume exceeds 40 billion US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Uniswap Labs published a statement on the X platform disclosing data, and the transaction volume of Uniswap v4 exceeded 40 billion US dollars in just 4 months after its launch.

data.title: Glassnode Highlights Key Support Levels Amid Bitcoin Sell-Off
data.description: According to Odaily, Glassnode has released an analysis indicating that Bitcoin long-term holders are gradually selling their assets due to a lack of strong upward catalysts and increased short-term pullback risks. If profit-taking continues, on-chain models suggest that critical support levels to watch are $103,700 and $95,600.
